LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JUSTIN DUGUAY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE PROPER SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. IN ADDITION, THIS APPEARS TO BE A HOUSING MATTER AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS IN THIS CASE SHOULD BE DIRECTED TO DEPARTMENT 501. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear.

The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial for plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The Court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.

JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Text Ruling

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff CLIFFORD E. CURRY, Tel No. 510-776-1871 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Plaintiff did not notify the Court or opposing party of his intent to appear to argue the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT JUSTIN DUGUAY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, the motion is granted. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate proper service of the defendant. In addition, this appears to be a housing matter and all future filings in this case should be directed to department 501. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
